# Generated Documentation Injections

## Purpose
This file is the single sink for auto-generated documentation sections produced by `utl/doc` generators.

## Notes
- Do not edit content inside auto-generated sections manually.
- Regenerate using `./utl/doc/run_all_doc.sh` from repository root.
